title: viburnum tomentosum f. rotundifolium
intro: Viburnum tomentosum f. rotundifolium, also known as the round-leaf woolly viburnum, is a variety of flowering shrub in the Adoxaceae family, native to Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum tomentosum f. rotundifolium include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Viburnum tomentosum f. rotundifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
